Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Claims And To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RECURLY, INC.'S unopposed Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiffs Claims And To Stay Action Pending Arbitration is granted.

Moving party is required to submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
